questions.question: According to Paul, how many people are righteous on their own?
Paul says people are justified freely by God's grace through what?
options: The redemption that is in Christ Jesus
questions.answer: The redemption that is in Christ Jesus

questions.question: Paul argues that faith in Christ overthrows and destroys the Law.
For all have _____ and fall short of the glory of God.
There is no _____, for all have sinned.
